title: AnvilColor
description: Allows colored and gradient item names via the anvil using &color codes and <#hex> gradients </#hex>.
body:
# 📦 AnvilColor

AnvilColor is a lightweight Bukkit plugin that allows players to rename items using both classic color codes and modern hex gradients directly through the anvil. Give your items stylish names without any commands or GUIs – simply type the code in the anvil rename field.
## Permission
```
anvilcolor.color # For &codes
anvilcolor.hex   # For Hexcodes

```


How to use

```
&cName (colercode)
<#4A90E2>Name</#F5A623>
```



## ✨ Features

    ✅ Supports classic & color and formatting codes (&c, &l, &n, etc.)

    🌈 Full support for hex color codes and gradients using <#hex>Text</#hex> syntax

    🔨 Works directly inside anvils — no commands required

    🎮 Vanilla-friendly with plugin-side rendering

    🧩 Built for Minecraft 1.21
